case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF S. F. vs. WOODS, RENEE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC BODY, CORPORATE AND POLITIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODS, RENEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1718 SUNNYDALE AVE $1,036.08 RENT, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,145.08, LEASE FORFEITED
